_comment: SINGLE-EDGE config (2026-06-26). Only fav_hold = behavioural favorite-longshot edge (buy 0.70-0.93, hold to settle, NO stop; live-confirmed +EV, +$700+ over 400+ trades, ~84% win). The spot/btc_spot_divergence sleeve was REJECTED live (19 trades, 15% win, -$74): offline assumed the Polymarket book LAGS the spot model, but LIVE the market is FASTER than the simple lognormal model, so trading the divergence loses. Two-edge backup kept on the box as portfolio.json history; favonly == this file. CLUE worth an offline check: 15% ~= inverse of an 85% favorite -> spot may be systematically wrong-sided, so FADING the model (flip the signal) might be +EV.
